text:
v 0.74 has  been replaced by 0.77 at the MN site.

	Note that this newer version installs correctly; but portlint
	gives me an err message that I don't understand:
"FATAL: no "ports collection makefile for" line in comment section of Makefile."


	uuencoded tarball appended.
